summary: Russian forces conducted an airstrike on a Ukrainian drone launch point and air defense system in Krasnoyarskoye, Donetsk People's Republic. The 412th Nemesis Brigade destroyed over 130 motor vehicles and dozens of motorcycles and quad bikes near Huliaipole in January-February 2026. A Russian Ka-52 helicopter was downed by a 59th Brigade FPV drone on the Pokrovsk front, with additional FPVs striking the crew during evacuation. The "Elka" anti-drone system intercepted Ukrainian fixed-wing drones "Darts" and "Maya" through kinetic impact, triggering onboard charges. The Ukrainian Navy used an FPV drone to sink an enemy boat near Tendrivska Spit in Kherson Oblast. Russian infantryman charged at a Ukrainian FPV drone with a bayonet and was killed. Iranian-backed militia carried out a fiber-optic FPV drone attack on US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport.
